evals.prompt: Build a scraper for Amazon product pages, I have about 50 ASINs I need to get pricing data for
evals.expected_output: A Python script that uses Bright Data's pre-built Amazon scraper (Web Scraper API or Python SDK) with async batch processing for 50 URLs, structured JSON output with pricing fields

evals.prompt: I need to scrape job listings from https://jobs.lever.co/openai including title, location, team, and link for each job. Need all pages.
evals.expected_output: A Python script that first checks for pre-built scrapers, then does site reconnaissance with Web Unlocker, analyzes HTML structure, identifies selectors, handles pagination, and produces a complete working scraper

evals.prompt: build a scraper for a React-based e-commerce site at https://shop.example.com that loads products on infinite scroll, I need product name, price, and image URL
evals.expected_output: A Python script using Bright Data Browser API with Playwright, infinite scroll handling, resource blocking for bandwidth optimization, and data extraction via page.evaluate()
